nasb.text: and the Arabah as far as the Sea of Chinneroth toward the east, and as far as the sea of the Arabah, even the Salt Sea, eastward toward Beth-jeshimoth, and on the south, at the foot of the slopes of Pisgah;

esv.text: and the Arabah to the Sea of Chinneroth eastward, and in the direction of Beth-jeshimoth, to the Sea of the Arabah, the Salt Sea, southward to the foot of the slopes of Pisgah;

cnv.text: 東邊有亞拉巴，上至基尼烈海，下至亞拉巴海，就是鹽海，東邊是往伯．耶西末的路；南邊直到毘斯迦的山麓。

ccb.text: 他的领土还包括约旦河谷东部：从加利利海至亚拉巴海，也就是盐海，到伯·耶西末，直到毗斯迦的山麓。
